channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-04-03)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-04-03.

item.title: [HOT] Universal Audio|Get up to 50% off in the Universal Audio UAD ‘Little Labs – Voice Of God’ Launch Sale.?NEW
[HOT] Baby Audio|Get 38% off Transit 2 by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Patchmaker|Get 500 Presets for Arturia Pigments by Patchmaker for free, normally priced at $45.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Martinic|Martinic Easter Flash Sale – up to 80% off all plugins and collections
[SAVE BIG] The Tone Foundry|Get 86% off Drum & Bass for Serum 2 Bundle by The Tone Foundry. The discounted price is $19.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 86% - Desarrollador: The Tone Foundry - Finaliza: 2026-05-04

item.title: [HOT] sonible|Get 52% off smart:essentials Bundle by sonible. The discounted price is $119.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] [HOT] Solid State Logic|Get 92% off Solid State Logic SSL Fusion Bundle by Solid State Logic. The discounted price is $75.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 92% - Desarrollador: Solid State Logic - Finaliza: 2026-04-16

item.title: [HOT] Kilohearts|Get 67% off Kilohearts Ecosystem Access Bundle by Kilohearts. The discounted price is $99.?NEW
[HOT] Baby Audio|Get 38% off Humanoid by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[HOT] Baby Audio|Get 38% off Smooth Operator Pro by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[HOT] Baby Audio|Get 38% off Grainferno by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Urban Kits|Urban Kits has released Plural, a free pitch-shifting sequencer plugin for Win and Mac.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Urban Kits - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Korneff Audio|Korneff Audio has released yesterday Power Grid Disruptor glitch and damage plugin for Mac, Win & Linux. The plugin is available as a free download for a limited time.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Korneff Audio - Finaliza: Unknown
